text: the relative position drag handlers do not update in realtime. also, let's remove that "skip 10 frames" logic for layout updates. it leads to jumps. the internal vs. render position split provides a more elegant perforamnce optimization.

status.comment: Removed the 'skip 10 frames' optimization in useGraphSimulation.ts. This ensures realtime physics updates (e.g. during dragging) while relying on the render-position split for visual performance.
